mapper.sql: su.id id, su.team_id team_id, su.user_id user_id, su.join_type join_type, su.status status, su.team_role team_role, su.join_time join_time
mapper.insert: insert into app_team_user ( team_id, user_id, join_type, status, team_role, join_time ) values ( #{team_id}, #{user_id}, #{join_type}, #{status}, IFNULL(#{team_role},'1'), #{join_time} )
